action.reasoning: Observation: Training ran 3 epochs in 184s but val_r2 was -300M (clearly broken) while val_loss was 0.004 (reasonable). Analysis: The R² computation has a numerical bug - likely some features have near-zero variance causing division issues. The MSE of 0.004 on pre-normalized data implies R² ≈ 0.996, so the model is actually working. Decision: Fix R² computation, add NaN checks, use cosine LR schedule, train longer (10 epochs ≈ 10min), and submit eval.
